## What does this change?

<!-- One or two sentences. Link any related issue with "Closes #123". -->

## Why?

<!-- The motivation / problem being solved. -->

## How was it tested?

<!-- New tests added? Did you run a real round-trip or integration test? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `python -m pytest tests/ -q` passes
- [ ] `python -m pyflakes pipeline/ tests/` is clean (zero warnings)
- [ ] New/changed code has tests (unit, and a real round-trip where feasible)
- [ ] Touched files have an updated revision-history block
- [ ] No credentials, real PII, or runtime artifacts committed
